subject: Fix broken parent tag
commit_message:
Fix broken parent tag

Wrong parent used in proto-definition, and relativePath is not specified.
Consequently, the release version (0.4.0) - which exists locally but not
in nexus - is not found.  Fixed by using correct parent and relative
path (../parent)

Change-Id: Ib9a3d845c76ca26a8de562470a3e4214e37ae057
Issue-ID: CCSDK-1001
Signed-off-by: Timoney, Dan (dt5972) <dtimoney@att.com>

Patch Set 2: Code-Review-1

please hold on merging. I'm figuring the parent so I can include this artifact in ODL, hence I'm trying to reduce dependency bbeing pulled in.

Patch Set 2:

because the parent is pulling way too un-needed things in ODL, creating wiring issues.

Patch Set 2:

OK - instead of odlparent-lite, you might want to look at the 2 springboot parent poms (for springboot 1 vs 2) instead.  Or, just use oparent, if that works.

The problem was that the parent used by that module wasn't in the directory above - so default relativePath doesn't find it.  When doing daily builds, the <version>s are already reset to the release version (based on version.properties), which don't exist yet in the 'public' nexus (only in staging) ... so without relativePath set properly, compile fails due to missing pom reference

Patch Set 2: -Code-Review

Ok. If you want to unblock then we can merge this patch. I'll submit a follow up.
Patch Set 2: Code-Review+2

Patch Set 2:

ok, sounds good Alexis - thanks!
Patch Set 2: Code-Review+2
Change has been successfully merged by Dan Timoney
